title: Property Spotlight
description: Hero photo with property specs, asking price, and investment vision.
speakerNotes: Introduce the property — name, location, type, asking price. Walk through the vision bullets.

title: Photo Gallery
description: Four-column photo gallery with property specs and operational vision on the right.
speakerNotes: Show the property through photos. Highlight the transformation potential.

title: Investment Model
description: Stacked photo panel with The Concept, Strategic Details, and Why This Property / Model.
speakerNotes: Deep-dive into the investment thesis. Explain the model, the market, and the three reasons this works.

title: Pipeline
description: Five-card property pipeline grid showing this property plus comparable portfolio assets.
speakerNotes: Context: this property sits within a broader pipeline of curated boutique assets.

title: Financial Snapshot
description: Three-column financial snapshot: Transformation Plan, Financing Summary, and Investment Narrative.
speakerNotes: Walk through the numbers: transformation cost, financing structure, and key financial ratios.

title: Income Statement
description: 5-year pro forma income statement table with investor key metrics sidebar.
speakerNotes: 5-year projection: revenue, expenses, NOI, debt service, cash flow, exit value. IRR and equity multiple on the right.
